subject: fix(mobile): resolve drag stale state, z-index stacking, and swipe issues
body:
Fix BottomSheet touch handlers using stale height closure by tracking
height via ref. Close bottom sheet when mobile menu opens to prevent
z-index conflicts. Prevent swipe gesture from triggering unintended
cell selection via preventDefault. Add keyboard shortcuts to mobile
overflow menu. Clear stale mobile state on desktop transition. Move
SWIPE_THRESHOLD to module scope. Memoize tabContent JSX.

Tags: mobile, touch, ux, performance
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-redesign
Semver: patch
